infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Smart Farmer uses the camera to capture crop images for disease prediction.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Smart Farmer uses your photo library to attach crop images.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Smart Farmer uses your location to find nearby buyers and show local demand.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Smart Farmer uses notifications for order and market alerts.
